_note: Major recurring antagonists of the Scalelist Universe. Each one was given a real anime-style portrait via Pollinations.ai with detailed character DNA — designed to remain visually consistent across future seasons.

antagonists.name: Captain Vass
antagonists.role: Vigolas's old rival from the Sea-Ghost era. Walked back from a timeline that almost happened. Claims the Storm-Throne by right.
antagonists.fate: Defeated by Vigolas at Lightning's Mouth. Knelt. Now serves as Captain of the Storm-Guard.

antagonists.name: The Dark Dancer
antagonists.role: Inverted shadow-twin of Rougeina. Devours stars to consume joy-memories. Wears Rougeina's face for one heartbeat at a time.
antagonists.fate: Sealed inside the Choreographer's Tomb after Rougeina's eight-blade dance.

antagonists.name: Vex (Forward Reader)
antagonists.role: 12-year-old prodigy who read a Codex page forward and unleashed six sins.
antagonists.fate: Bound by Trollmage's Eighth Codex. Now his official apprentice.

antagonists.name: Old Kasper
antagonists.role: Kompis's original subtick mentor. Founded the Cartel that hunted Kompis for Mingus's bond.
antagonists.fate: Defeated by Kompis + Mingus shared subtick. Imprisoned at Stormcoast under Vigolas's watch.

antagonists.name: Echo (The Fourth Voice)
antagonists.first_seen: Season 3 + 4 — The Trinity War / Echo's Last Stand
antagonists.role: The fourth voice Smurjan's Triad refused 3000 years ago. Lobbied. Then attacked.
antagonists.fate: Absorbed permanently into Smurjan's body in S4. He now carries her as the internal Tetrad.

antagonists.name: Backward-Self
antagonists.first_seen: Season 4 — The Crack in the Seal
antagonists.role: K-XII's mirror-soul wearing Vigolas's face. Saboteur of the Architects' Seal.
antagonists.fate: Killed by Vigolas at Lightning's Mouth. K-XII's soul-thread sealed in the Eighth Codex.

antagonists.name: The Star Killer
antagonists.role: Echo's left-hand shadow servant. Murdered eight Starfloor stars before being cornered.
antagonists.fate: Ended by Rougeina's forbidden 12,001 HADOM dance. Echo's left hand sealed beside Echo herself.

antagonists.name: The Possessed Hand
antagonists.role: Apprentice Nock's severed right hand, possessed by Pride after one cosmic year of forward-reading.
antagonists.fate: Re-bonded to Nock via the Eighth Codex's Apprenticeship binding. Pride is now sealed.

antagonists.name: Bakasura (The Hunger)
antagonists.role: Four-faced cosmic eater. The oldest hunger. Has consumed reality fragments since before gods existed.
antagonists.fate: Withdrew from the Lake when Mingus's true form spoke. Will return when hunger compels. STILL AT LARGE.

antagonists.name: K-XII (The Unwritten)
antagonists.first_seen: Cosmic — first mentioned in canon, central to S4
antagonists.role: The Twelfth Architect who broke the Ferdinand Oath and was unwritten from existence. Their fragments hunted Vigolas throughout S4.
antagonists.fate: Soul-thread bound inside the Eighth Codex inside the Architects' Seal. Triple-sealed.

antagonists.name: Elder Vasik
antagonists.role: Last surviving rogue Codex Council member. Tried to drain the Whisper Pine for forbidden knowledge.
antagonists.fate: Captured. Trapped in unbreakable Necromancer-Reach stone. Reformed and works as a humble cypress-keeper.

antagonists.name: Corrupted Warden
antagonists.role: Mirror-Warden possessed by Echo as her vessel. Half man, half Echo.
antagonists.fate: Echo extracted by Smurjan's soul-extraction spell. Warden survives. Walks unmasked now.
